title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 443.250 - Proceedings where mortgagee, secured party, mortgagor or debtor dies
text:
443.250.  Proceedings where mortgagee, secured party, mortgagor or debtor dies. — In case of the death of the mortgagee or the secured party or his assignee, or of the mortgagor or debtor, whether before or after action brought, the personal representative of the deceased party shall be made plaintiff or defendant, as the case may require.
(RSMo 1939 § 3453, A.L. 1965 p. 114) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3066; 1919 § 2225; 1909 § 2832
